background_prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: wide TaraHome technical blog cover background for a product-specific IKEA BILRESA guide
Primary request: a clean, realistic warm residential scene prepared for later compositing of two real small smart-home remote controls; show an uncluttered oak sideboard in a calm living room with a softly glowing lamp in the background and a practical everyday-home feeling
Scene/backdrop: warm modern living room, natural oak, linen, off-white plaster wall, one restrained dark-green ceramic accent, subtle plants, believable lived-in detail
Style/medium: editorial interior photography, photorealistic, natural material texture, not a render
Composition/framing: wide 16:9 landscape; low eye-level view; generous clear tabletop area in the lower center foreground for later product placement; background softly out of focus; no people
Lighting/mood: soft late-afternoon window light mixed with a warm lamp, calm and practical, true-to-life color
Constraints: background scene only; no smart-home device, no remote, no hub, no router, no phone, no screen, no text, no logo, no watermark; no embedded title poster; no fake chart or graph; no network or routing lines; no translucent panel; no inset frame; no floating UI card; no progress bar
Avoid: generic AI diagram look, over-staged luxury showroom, glossy CGI surfaces, excessive beige, decorative technology motifs
product_composite_direction: Place the exact official IKEA BILRESA dual-button and scroll-wheel product photographs naturally on the oak surface, preserving product geometry and controls. Use subtle contact shadows only. No panels, text, UI, network lines, or invented hardware.
